name: marinara-engine
description: AI Chat & Roleplay Frontend — Conversation, Roleplay, Visual Novel
author: Marianna

scripts.package: pnpm build && node electron/bundle-server.cjs && electron-builder --config electron-builder.cjs
scripts.package:win: pnpm build && node electron/bundle-server.cjs && electron-builder --config electron-builder.cjs --win
scripts.package:mac: pnpm build && node electron/bundle-server.cjs && electron-builder --config electron-builder.cjs --mac
scripts.package:linux: pnpm build && node electron/bundle-server.cjs && electron-builder --config electron-builder.cjs --linux
scripts.clean: pnpm -r run clean && rm -rf node_modules release
